en: The New Zealand Companies Office website has a publicly available, online database that contains some of the information that is provided by businesses when they register for incorporation.
Is your company registered with the New Zealand Companies Office?
What is your Company Number registered with the New Zealand Companies Office?
Most businesses legally registered and operating in New Zealand are required to register with the Inland Revenue Department to pay applicable taxes.
Is your company registered with the New Zealand Inland Revenue Department (IRD)?
The IRD number is a unique number issued by the Inland Revenue Department to business for tax purposes.
Does your company have an IRD number?
The IRD number typically contains 8 to 9-digits.
What is your company’s IRD number?
Does your company have a Goods and Services Tax (GST) number that is different from your company’s IRD number?
What is your company’s GST number?
The BIC number is used by some New Zealand government agencies such as the Accident Compensation Corporation (ACC) for business activity classification purposes.
